- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [7 Free Public APIs for Developers](https://deadsimplechat.com/blog/7-free-apis-for-developers/) - A list of free APIs for developers.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [8 Free Public APIs](https://dev.to/shivams1007/8-free-public-apis-for-developer-5ah9) - Free APIs for developers.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [AnyAPI](https://any-api.com/) - A directory of free APIs.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [RapidAPI Free APIs](https://rapidapi.com/collection/list-of-free-apis) - Collection of free APIs.

  

- [face-api.js](https://justadudewhohacks.github.io/face-api.js/docs/index.html?ref=dailydev) - JavaScript API for face detection and recognition.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Credit Card Generator](https://www.akto.io/tools/credit-card-generator) - Generate test credit card numbers.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Temp Mail](https://temp-mail.org/en/) - Disposable temporary email service.
